briefdescription.para: ASU KDF Key length in bytes.
ASU KDF Fixed data length in bytes.
To notify the call back from client library.
Status variable to store the error returned from server.
This function uses input key and fixed input data and calculates KDF output key.

para.verbatim: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the ASU KDF client APIs.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if KDF successfully generated for given inputS.
XST_FAILURE, if the KDF generation fails.//! [KDF example]

briefdescription.para: Call back function which will be registered with library to notify the completion of request.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the call back reference.

Status of the request will be passed as an argument during callback
0 Upon success
Error code from ASUFW application upon any error

briefdescription.para: This function prints the given KDF on the console.
Main function to call the Asu_KdfExample.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if KDF successfully generated for given inputs.
XST_FAILURE, if the KDF generation fails.
